message:
🐛 Always show participating cluster badges on compliance cards (#2171)

- Remove >1 gate on TrivyScan, KubescapeScan, KyvernoPolicies cluster badges
- Add cluster badges to ComplianceScore showing which clusters contribute
- Add cluster badges to PolicyViolations showing Kyverno-installed clusters
- Ensures every compliance card clearly indicates its data sources

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
